data.summary_suggestion: Validate and retrieve OAuth2 token information
data.description_suggestion: Validates an OAuth2 access token and returns metadata about the token including user ID, scope, expiration time, and token type. Accepts either an access token or refresh token as input. Returns token information object (Tokeninfo) containing token validity status, associated user, granted scopes, and expiration details. Useful for verifying token validity before making authenticated API calls.
data.reasoning: Operation has no summary or description. Added clear action-oriented summary and comprehensive description explaining the operation's purpose (token validation), expected inputs (access or refresh token), return value (Tokeninfo schema), and use case for AI agents to understand when to invoke this operation.

Added action-oriented summary and detailed description explaining the operation's purpose, authentication requirements (OAuth2), return value (Userinfo schema), and typical use case for AI agents to understand when to call this endpoint.

data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the profile information of the authenticated end-user. Requires OAuth2 authentication (implicit or authorization code flow). Returns a Userinfo object containing user identity details such as user ID, email address, name, picture URL, and other profile attributes. This operation is commonly used after obtaining an authorization grant to access the authenticated user's basic profile data.
data.reasoning: Operation has no summary or description. Added action-oriented summary and detailed description explaining the operation's purpose, authentication requirements (OAuth2), return value (Userinfo schema), and typical use case for AI agents to understand when to call this endpoint.

data.summary_suggestion: Get current authenticated user profile details
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the profile information of the currently authenticated user using the '/me' endpoint convention. Requires OAuth2 authentication. Returns a Userinfo object containing the authenticated user's identity and profile attributes including user ID, email, name, picture, and other profile information. This is the v2 endpoint variant of the userinfo operation, providing the same functionality with updated API versioning.
